programmes.show_description: Homecoming: American drama following the survivors of a plane crash. Jack and Locke formulate a plan of defence when Claire returns with no memory of what has happened recently.
Outlaws: Secrets are divulged as Kate joins Sawyer in the hunt for a boar he insists is stalking him. Hurley and Sayid worry about Charlie's mental health.
Second Hand Pose: Drama series. After being left in an industrial freezer, Terry looks for alternative employment and gets work helping out in the second-hand furniture business.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Shopping from home.
A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football and Formula One to darts - that includes many memorable moments.
Brother Hood: Adventure series. A reclusive industrial magnate offers an assignment to Harry that involves the engineering of his brother's escape from a Mediterranean island prison.
LA: When Robin sends Thomas on a business trip to Los Angeles, the PI meets a comedian who is promptly murdered and accidentally proposes to a woman.
Around the Corner: Comedy-drama series. Arthur's luck seems to be going to the dogs when he buys a dodgy greyhound and gets conned over some bent videos.
Action from the day's games in the Football League, including Millwall v Norwich, Ipswich v Birmingham, Swansea v Middlesbrough and Hull v Coventry in the Championship.
Big Spender: Regan and Carter are on a surveillance job watching a notorious gang of hijackers who have managed to avoid conviction when they uncover a lucrative car-parking fraud.
Clash of the Champions: US robot combat series. A violent Main Event sees fifth series champion End Game takes on 2019 runner-up Witch Doctor in a clash of the vertical spinners.
One Picture Is Worth: Classic US action drama series. Thomas agrees to protect - but then lets slip away unnoticed - a deaf artist who witnessed four murders during a bank robbery.
I Was Happy Where I Was: Classic US detective drama. A Puerto Rican cop goes undercover in his old neighbourhood to investigate reports of an extortion racket and uncovers a scheme.
Cab Ranks Cowboys: Classic drama. Ken discovers that it is hard to find a cab when you need one, and particularly so when a thief has exactly the same idea as you.
Sharpe's Gold: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Summer 1813 - an angry Sharpe goes in search of British infantrymen who failed to prevent a French retreat from a recent battle.
Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Chase Lakes in France as they try to catch a carp in front of underwater cameras.
Henry's Mediterranean odyssey continues with a ride through southern Spain, the restoration of the 1970 Chopper gathers pace, and Henry gets a sneak peek at the latest AJS models.
Lee Mack hosts another episode of the logic and common sense-based game show - 100 contestants will start, but who will make it to the end to try to win up to 100,000 pounds?
Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Carl Weathers, 1979. Rocky is struggling with family life after fighting Apollo Creed when he is goaded into a rematch.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Carl Weathers, 1979. Rocky is struggling with family life after fighting Apollo Creed when he is goaded into a rematch.
When the Boat Goes Out: Classic comedy-drama series. It's time to go home, but Dennis wants one last night alone with Dagmar when a fire at the hut forces the lads to join him.
The Balance of Power: Comedy-drama series. Arthur decides to stand as a candidate in a local council by-election when his used car lot is threatened by a compulsory purchase order.
See No Evil: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Harry and Caroline are assigned to keep tabs on a senator who is investigating organised crime in Rome.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Shopping from home.
A selection of the best hot shots from ITV Sport's snooker coverage.
See No Evil: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Harry and Caroline are assigned to keep tabs on a senator who is investigating organised crime in Rome.
I Was Happy Where I Was: Classic US detective drama. A Puerto Rican cop goes undercover in his old neighbourhood to investigate reports of an extortion racket and uncovers a scheme.
Give Us This Day Arthur Daley's Bread: Comedy-drama series. Arthur digs a very large hole for himself when he recruits some ex-cons as cheap labour for a gardening enterprise.
Cab Ranks Cowboys: Classic drama. Ken discovers that it is hard to find a cab when you need one, and particularly so when a thief has exactly the same idea as you.
Contact Breaker: Cult '70s police drama series. A bank robbery looks like an inside job, but Regan thinks otherwise and tries to prove that a convict on parole was framed.
Bigger Than Bots: US robot combat series. A legendary driver attempts to overcome an opponent and personal grief as the second half of the World Championship qualifiers begins.
Straight and Narrow: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas is hired by an old acquaintance to find a missing vice girl, he trawls through her list of clients to find clues.
Kojak's Days - Part One: Classic US detective drama. Theo tries to enjoy a day off, but he then gets dragged into dealing with a body found in a stolen car and a scheming woman.
House Guests: Classic drama. Harry is taken for a ride when he accepts a job minding a country mansion and discovers uninvited guests in his flat.
Bad Pennies: Classic drama. Ken and Harry guard a family against an ex-con with a grudge, and Rocky rallies the troops for a car event where Laura ends up in the firing line.
Abduction: When Regan's ex-wife goes to pick up their daughter from school, she discovers that the girl has been kidnapped - and it's up to Regan to get her back.
Life in the Fast Food Lane: Comedy-drama series. Arthur gets into the car phone business with a dodgy supplier, and Terry fancies a girl who tries to hide her rich family background.
Sharpe's Battle: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. September 1813 - Sharpe and his men come across a scene of devastation in the town of Casa Antiga while in the Spanish hills.
Bond film starring Roger Moore and Maud Adams, 1983. 007's investigation into a fellow agent's murder leads him to an Indian mogul collaborating with a belligerent Soviet general.
